topic: AgentRead: Diagnosing and Closing the Discovery-to-Utilization Gap in Tool-Augmented LLMs

papers.title: Agents Explore but Agents Ignore: LLMs Lack Environmental Curiosity
papers.key_result: gpt-oss-120b 97.54% discovery vs 0.53% use; Terminal-Bench 79-81%/37-50%; AppWorld 90%+/<7%

papers.title: Empowering LLM Tool Invocation with Tool-call Reward Model (TRM)
papers.method: Process reward model 3B; PPO/GRPO integration; refined credit assignment & turn-level advantage
papers.key_result: 10K samples train 3B TRM; consistently > outcome-only RL on search-QA & math
papers.relevance: 直接竞品 — invocation correctness vs utilization

papers.title: ToolRL: Reward is All Tool Learning Needs
papers.method: Principled reward design (types/scales/granularity/temporal) for tool RL
papers.key_result: +17% over base, +15% over SFT across benchmarks

papers.title: Search-R1: Training LLMs to Reason and Leverage Search Engines with RL
papers.method: Outcome RL + retrieved token masking + multi-turn search

papers.title: R1-Searcher: Incentivizing Search Capability via RL
R1-Searcher++: Dynamic Knowledge Acquisition via RL
StepTool: Step-grained RL Framework for Tool Learning
papers.method: Step-grained reward shaping + step-grained policy optimization
papers.key_result: >SFT and RL on Pass Rate & Recall of relevant tools
papers.relevance: step reward precedent, complementary to TRM

papers.title: ReTool: RL for Strategic Tool Use
iTool: Reinforced Fine-Tuning with Dynamic Deficiency Identification
Tool Zero: Training Tool-Augmented LLMs via Pure RL from Scratch
TRACE: Trajectory-Aware Comprehensive Evaluation for Deep Research Agents
papers.method: Hierarchical Trajectory Utility Function — process efficiency + cognitive quality + evidence grounding
papers.key_result: counters Pass@1 high-score illusion; latent capability eval

papers.title: DORA Explorer: Improving Exploration Ability of LLMs Without Training
Can Current Agents Close the Discovery-to-Application Gap? (SciCrafter)
papers.key_result: GPT-5.2/Gemini-3-Pro/Claude-Opus-4.5 plateau ~26%; knowledge application is biggest gap
papers.relevance: Most adjacent prior on discovery-vs-application; different scale (Minecraft vs tool-use)

papers.title: AgentPRM: Process Reward Models via Step-Wise Promise & Progress
papers.method: MC-rollout based PRM; promise + progress decomposition
papers.relevance: step reward, but rollout-based not observation-causality-based

papers.title: Reinforcement Learning for LLM Agent Planning (RLTR)
papers.method: Tool-use completeness reward + KD/rejection sampling cold-start
papers.key_result: RL trains planner; outperforms cold-start only

papers.title: Enhancing LLM Agents with Automated Process Supervision
Sufficient Context: A New Lens on RAG Systems
papers.method: Sufficient context classifier + selective generation for abstention

papers.title: Lost in the Middle: How Language Models Use Long Contexts
papers.key_result: U-shape; 30% degradation when relevant info in middle

papers.title: FaithfulRAG: Fact-Level Conflict Modeling for Context-Faithful RAG
CoRM-RAG: Counterfactual Risk Minimization
papers.method: Cognitive Perturbation Protocol; counterfactual user-bias simulation

papers.title: FaithEval: Faithfulness Evaluation Framework
papers.key_result: SOTA models still fail on counterfactual context

papers.title: Mindful-RAG: Intent & Context-Aware Generation
papers.method: Intent+context aware generation; counterfactual perturbation robustness

papers.title: Beyond Reward Hacking: Causal Rewards for LLM Alignment
papers.method: Counterfactual invariance for reward model training
papers.relevance: causal reward concept; CORE related prior

papers.title: Counterfactual Reward Model Training for Bias Mitigation (Multimodal RL)
Reward Hacking Benchmark: Measuring Exploits in LLM Agents with Tool Use
papers.method: Adversarial benchmark for tool agent reward hacking

papers.title: Reward Shaping to Mitigate Reward Hacking in RLHF
The Fragile Truth of Saliency: Attention Bias Optimization
papers.method: Bias-injected saliency via attention; causal saliency

papers.title: Large-Scale Training Data Attribution with Efficient Influence Functions (LoGra)
BFCL: Berkeley Function Calling Leaderboard V1-V4
ToolBench / ToolLLM
API-Bank: A Benchmark for Tool-Augmented LLMs
Terminal-Bench: Benchmarking Agents on Hard Realistic Tasks in CLI
AppWorld: Controllable World of Apps and People for Coding Agents
MCP-Zero: Active Tool Discovery for Autonomous LLM Agents
RAG-MCP: Mitigating Prompt Bloat via RAG for Tool Selection

themes.name: tool-use RL (outcome-dominated)
themes.dominant_approach: outcome reward + GRPO/PPO over multi-turn tool trajectories
themes.summary: 主流路线，把 tool calls 当 token、task 成功作 sparse outcome reward。无人关心 observation 是否被用上。

themes.name: step-level / process reward
themes.dominant_approach: train PRM 或 step-grained shaping 与 outcome 联合
themes.summary: 弥补 outcome 颗粒。但所有方法都奖励 'this step is good for completion'，无人奖励 'this action depended on previous observation'。

themes.name: agent diagnostics / metacognitive failure
themes.dominant_approach: 注入 solution / 分解 capacity / 测 trajectory utility
themes.summary: 近 6 个月 4 篇都指向 outcome metric 无法捕获的 trajectory 退化。Anchor paper 是最直接证据。当前只做诊断不做 fix——AgentRead 的转化空间。

themes.name: context utilization & RAG faithfulness
themes.dominant_approach: faithfulness 评测、充分性分类器、counterfactual perturbation
themes.summary: RAG 社区独立发展了 utilization 概念但未上 RL trajectory，是 AgentRead 的 cross-domain transfer 源。

themes.name: counterfactual / causal reward + attention attribution
themes.dominant_approach: counterfactual invariance for reward model; attention bias saliency
themes.summary: counterfactual 在 RLHF 偏好对齐已 work；attention attribution NeurIPS 2025 指出现有方法对无关 token 误归权。两者从未被搬到 tool agent 的 RL 训练。最大不确定性 = AttribRL 的核心赌注。

themes.name: tool selection / MCP retrieval
themes.dominant_approach: 把 tool list 当语料 / retrieval 检索
themes.summary: 上游 vs 下游正交：AgentRead 关心读到 tool output 后是否用上；这条线只评 Recall@k。

gaps.description: 缺乏 14-model × 5-benchmark 规模的 discovery/use/conversion 三维实证表；Anchor 只覆盖 2 个 benchmark、不分 model 家族尺寸
现有 tool-use RL 从未把 reward 锚到 tool output utilization；TRM/ToolRL/Search-R1 都不奖励'用上了'
Counterfactual reward signal 已在 RLHF 与 RAG faithfulness 证明有效，从未作为 trajectory-level training reward 喂给 tool agent
Process reward models (AgentPRM/StepTool) 依赖标注或 MC rollouts 估 progress；无 self-supervised observation-action causality signal
discovery/use/conversion 三元定义只在 P01 出现且只用 LLM judge；缺乏 causal (counterfactual) 的严格 'use' 定义
discovery-utilization gap 的机制学分析缺位（attention 失锚 vs overconfidence vs SFT artifact）
Lexical attribution (rouge-L) 便宜但易被 verbatim copy 攻击；counterfactual 严谨但贵——无工作组合二者作防御性 reward
λ schedule 在 RLHF 有研究但未应用到 outcome+utilization 混合 reward 的 tool agent
EMNLP/ACL 社区已 ≥4 篇 tool-use RL paper 但全聚焦 reward design / step supervision，从未碰 utilization 定义
RAG faithfulness 的 counterfactual perturbation 评测从未被搬到 tool agent trajectory 上
Tool-retrieval 工作 (MCP-Zero / RAG-MCP) 只评 Recall@k 不评 downstream utilization；上下游脱节
Plan B 'diagnostic-only' 方向：14-model×5-bench DiscUseBench 缺位 + Anchor 不释 data；EMNLP Findings/Main 接此类诊断

top_authors.name: Cheng Qian
top_authors.direction: reward design generalization → cross-task tool agent

top_authors.name: Irwin King
top_authors.direction: trajectory eval → likely trajectory utility training

coauthor_clusters.label: Cluster A — Berkeley/UIUC tool-use RL
coauthor_clusters.relationship_to_other_groups: 正在收敛到 step-level reward — 与 AttribRL utilization 主题直接相邻

coauthor_clusters.label: Cluster B — Cohere/Edinburgh agent diagnostics
coauthor_clusters.relationship_to_other_groups: 潜在直接对手 timeline — 预计 6-9 月内会做训练侧 fix；AgentRead 必须抢节奏

coauthor_clusters.label: Cluster C — NeurIPS 2025 attribution
coauthor_clusters.focus: 通用 LLM 解释性 / attention attribution
coauthor_clusters.relationship_to_other_groups: 与 agent 社区零交集 — AgentRead 桥接价值

coauthor_clusters.label: Cluster D — China-mainland RAG faithfulness
coauthor_clusters.relationship_to_other_groups: 工具链成熟但未上 RL trajectory — cross-domain transfer 源
